nasb.text: As for the saints who are in the earth, They are the majestic ones in whom is all my delight.

esv.text: As for the saints in the land, they are the excellent ones, in whom is all my delight.

cnv.text: 至於世上的聖民， 他們都是尊貴榮美的人，全是我所喜愛的。

ccb.text: 世上敬畏你的人极其尊贵， 是我所喜爱的。

csbs.text: 至于这地上的圣民，他们都是尊贵的， 是我全部的喜乐。
